mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO agent_graph_edge (agent_definition_id, from_node, to_node, condition_expr, sort_order) VALUES
(#{item.agentDefinitionId}, #{item.fromNode}, #{item.toNode}, #{item.conditionExpr}, #{item.sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT id, agent_definition_id, from_node, to_node, condition_expr, sort_order FROM agent_graph_edge WHERE agent_definition_id = #{agentDefinitionId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC
